SELF-PUBLISHER

← BACK TO PRINT
Most of us embrace Creative Commons — letting ideas float in the air. Feel free to preview and switch to A4 mode to create compact books with your home printer. Please support us by purchasing our physical books, and every author accepts tips directly.
  • AUTHOR Enter the inner world of authors: a home for expression, where you are free to read, hold and resonate.
  • GROUND IP PROJECT Presenting the historical framework of intellectual property, grounded in lived experience.
